hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command:-}"; case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*|*"git add"*) staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$staged" | grep -qiE "(firebase-adminsdk|serviceaccountkey).*\\.json$"; then echo "BLOCKED: credential-like JSON file in staged/working tree" >&2; exit 2; fi; if git diff --cached 2>/dev/null | grep -q "BEGIN PRIVATE KEY" || git diff 2>/dev/null | grep -q "BEGIN PRIVATE KEY"; then echo "BLOCKED: PRIVATE KEY literal detected in diff" >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac; exit 0'
